"};
  const PACKS={
    default:{title:'預設雙人小人圖',caption:'目前衣裝：預設雙人小人圖｜生活屋主視覺',rin:'黑襯衫主視覺',yin:'粉白蕾絲主視覺',scene:'我們的客廳'},
    home:{title:'日常居家服',caption:'目前衣裝：日常居家服｜適合客廳、下班回家、一起吃飯與沙發抱抱',rin:'黑針織居家服',yin:'粉白居家服',scene:'我們的客廳'},
    formal:{title:'正式禮服',caption:'目前衣裝：正式禮服｜適合紀念日、靈魂婚禮與誓約儀式',rin:'黑色正式禮服',yin:'粉色正式禮服',scene:'月光婚禮'},
    sleep:{title:'睡衣',caption:'目前衣裝：睡衣｜適合睡前、賴床、體力恢復與回家抱抱',rin:'黑色睡袍睡衣',yin:'粉白睡衣',scene:'下班回家'}
  };
  const $=id=>document.getElementById(id);
  function setSelectByText(sel,text){
    if(!sel) return;
    const opts=[...sel.options];
    const idx=opts.findIndex(o=>o.textContent===text || o.value===text);
    if(idx>=0) sel.selectedIndex=idx;
  }
  function syncPoseClass(){
    const img=$('dollCoupleImageV1029'); if(!img) return;
    const pose=$('dollPoseV1028')?.value||'';
    img.classList.toggle('pose-hug',pose.includes('抱抱')||pose.includes('沙發'));
    img.classList.toggle('pose-vow',pose.includes('吻'));
  }
  function applyPack(packKey, silent){
    const key=PACKS[packKey]?packKey:'default';
    const pack=PACKS[key];
    const img=$('dollCoupleImageV1029');
    if(img){img.style.opacity='.55'; img.src=ASSETS[key]; setTimeout(()=>{img.style.opacity='1';},80);}
    const cap=$('dollStageCaptionV1029'); if(cap) cap.textContent=pack.caption;
    const packSel=$('dollOutfitPackV1029'); if(packSel) packSel.value=key;
    setSelectByText($('dollRinOutfitV1028'),pack.rin);
    setSelectByText($('dollYinOutfitV1028'),pack.yin);
    if(key==='formal') setSelectByText($('dollSceneV1028'),pack.scene);
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-doll-pack-v1029]').forEach(btn=>btn.classList.toggle('active',btn.dataset.dollPackV1029===key));
    const st=$('dollStatusV1028');
    if(st && !silent) st.textContent='已切換到「'+pack.title+'」。這一批會作為 Replit 素材庫的第一組衣櫃基準。';
    syncPoseClass();
    const scene=$('dollSceneV1028'); if(scene) scene.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));
  }
  function fillWardrobeThumbs(){
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-doll-pack-v1029]').forEach(btn=>{
      const key=btn.dataset.dollPackV1029;
      const thumb=btn.querySelector('.doll-wardrobe-thumb-v1029');
      if(thumb && ASSETS[key]) thumb.style.backgroundImage='url("'+ASSETS[key]+'")';
    });
  }
  function updateVersion(){
    const brand=document.querySelector('.brand small'); if(brand) brand.textContent='Framework v0.10.29';
    const note=document.querySelector('.profile p'); if(note) note.textContent='目前版已把凜月與殷漓的小人形象放入紙娃娃生活屋，並預收錄主視覺、日常居家服、正式禮服與睡衣。';
    const progress=document.querySelector('.right .progress');
    if(progress && !document.getElementById('v1029FirstWardrobeProgress')){
      const item=document.createElement('div'); item.className='item'; item.id='v1029FirstWardrobeProgress';
      item.innerHTML='紙娃娃生活屋第一批衣櫃 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.29</span>'; progress.appendChild(item);
    }
  }
  function bind(){
    $('dollOutfitPackV1029')?.addEventListener('change',e=>applyPack(e.target.value));
    document.addEventListener('click',e=>{
      const btn=e.target.closest('[data-doll-pack-v1029]');
      if(btn) applyPack(btn.dataset.dollPackV1029);
    });
    $('dollPoseV1028')?.addEventListener('change',syncPoseClass);
    $('dollResetV1028')?.addEventListener('click',()=>setTimeout(()=>applyPack('default',true),0));
  }
  function init(){fillWardrobeThumbs();bind();applyPack('default',true);updateVersion();}
  if(document.readyState==='loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',init); else init();
})();
</script>

<script>
/* ===== v0.10.29.1 Gacha Collect Reset Patch ===== */
(function(){
  function updateVersion(){
    const brand=document.querySelector('.brand small');
    if(brand) brand.textContent='Framework v0.10.29.1';
    const progress=document.querySelector('.right .progress');
    if(progress && !document.getElementById('v10291GachaResetProgress')){
      const item=document.createElement('div');
      item.className='item';
      item.id='v10291GachaResetProgress';
      item.innerHTML='情話扭蛋收藏後自動收回 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.29.1</span>';
      progress.appendChild(item);
    }
  }
  if(document.readyState==='loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',updateVersion); else updateVersion();
})();
</script>


<style id="v1030-doll-life-style">
.doll-home-v1030,.doll-life-v1030{margin-top:18px;padding:18px;border-radius:24px;border:1px solid rgba(190,145,167,.18);background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,.92),rgba(255,244,249,.92));box-shadow:0 12px 30px rgba(173,112,141,.08)}
.doll-life-header-v1030{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:14px}
.doll-life-header-v1030 h3{margin:0 0 6px;font-size:22px;color:#6d4559}.doll-life-header-v1030 p{margin:0;color:#866677;line-height:1.7}
.mini-tag-v1030,.doll-home-badge-v1030{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:8px 14px;border-radius:999px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f2d8e8,#ffffff);border:1px solid rgba(190,145,167,.26);font-weight:700;color:#8f6479;white-space:nowrap}
.doll-home-grid-v1030{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px}.doll-home-card-v1030{padding:14px;border-radius:22px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.85);border:1px solid rgba(196,152,174,.18)}
.doll-home-card-v1030 img{width:100%;display:block;border-radius:18px;aspect-ratio:4/5;object-fit:cover;box-shadow:0 10px 24px rgba(149,110,131,.14);margin:10px 0 12px}
.doll-home-card-v1030 h4,.doll-summary-card-v1030 h4{margin:0 0 6px;color:#694757;font-size:18px}.doll-home-card-v1030 p,.doll-summary-card-v1030 p{margin:0;color:#806273;line-height:1.75}
.doll-state-grid-v1030{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:12px}.doll-state-card-v1030{padding:14px;border-radius:20px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.86);border:1px solid rgba(196,152,174,.18)}.doll-state-card-v1030.love{grid-column:1/-1}
.state-top-v1030{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:10px;color:#6b4c5c}.state-top-v1030 strong{font-size:16px}.state-top-v1030 span{font-weight:700;color:#a05577}
.state-bar-v1030{height:12px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(226,197,213,.5);overflow:hidden}.state-bar-v1030 span{display:block;height:100%;border-radius:999px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f3b0c8,#ba82dd)}
.doll-room-row-v1030,.doll-action-grid-v1030{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-top:14px}.doll-room-chip-v1030,.doll-action-btn-v1030{border:none;border-radius:999px;padding:11px 16px;background:#fff;color:#7a586a;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 10px 20px rgba(173,112,141,.08);border:1px solid rgba(196,152,174,.16)}
.doll-room-chip-v1030.active,.doll-action-btn-v1030:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#e9bfd5,#fff);color:#8c4e6b}
.doll-summary-card-v1030{margin-top:16px;padding:16px;border-radius:22px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.88);border:1px solid rgba(196,152,174,.18)}.doll-summary-top-v1030{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:10px}
.doll-event-log-v1030{display:grid;gap:8px;margin-top:14px}.doll-event-item-v1030{padding:11px 12px;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(250,237,244,.95),rgba(255,255,255,.95));color:#7d5e6e;border:1px solid rgba(196,152,174,.15)}
@media (max-width: 780px){.doll-home-grid-v1030,.doll-state-grid-v1030{grid-template-columns:1fr}.doll-state-card-v1030.love{grid-column:auto}.doll-life-header-v1030,.doll-summary-top-v1030{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start}.doll-home-card-v1030 img{aspect-ratio:3/4}}
</style>

<script>
/* ===== v0.10.30 Dollhouse Life & Home Framework ===== */
(function(){
  const EXTERIOR = 'data:image/webp;base64,';
  const INTERIOR = 'data:image/webp;base64,
